turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Key Roles & Responsibilities
• Run and expand Construction department to achieve BU goals and objectives.
• Optimize manpower plan, select and develop a team of specialist to ensure quality and timely response to any querries related to Engineering and Construction activities.
• Add new services in offshore Construction & Maintenance field.
• Find new business opportunities for offshore Construction & Maintenance.
• Develop & maintain working relationships with clients and acquire new projects.
• Increase market awareness of Milaha Offshore & Marine (HOSC) capabilities.
• Ensure Construction project / operations / work processes occur in accordance with all relevant legal, regulatory and any other standards and requirements to which compliance is required.
• Assist in review of contract / tendering documentation to ensure that documentations are in line with specifications and requirements.
• Work closely with Commercial & Business Development Managmer and VP Operations to execute long term business plan & actively evaluating new business opportunities jointly with business development.
• Effectively communicate any labor related to contract requirements and ensure compliance with set standards and regulations.
• Perform operational project coordination activities ensuring the selection of the most appropriate material and services based on quality, price and delivery time.
• Participate in conducting site Engineering and Construction activities, composing work pack and procurement as required.
• Perform a variety of technical and support activities related to the preparation of contracts, agreements, Tenders and all other written documents.
• Participate in conducting inspections on construction and maintenance materials, supplies, equipment and services for quality and quantity to ensure adherence to Milaha Offshore specifications.
• Monitor field work which consist of contract work and ensuring compliance with company standards, procedures, specifications and codes.
• Ensure the adherence to HSE standards, quality requirements and financial accountability.
• Liaise with vessels and clients for day to day operations as required.
• Coordinates the flow of information between Project, Subsea, Engineering, Commercial, Marine, Technical, Crew Manning, and Fabrication Yard.
• Participate in Operational management review
• Ensure the health and safety of all employees and the protection of the environment for all sites/work premises under their control.
• Perform other job-related duties as assigned   .   Extract only the key words from the job description for me to add in my CV

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
As an experienced Construction Manager, I have led and expanded the Construction department to achieve company goals and objectives, optimizing the manpower plan and developing a team of specialists to ensure quality and timely response to any Engineering and Construction activities. I have added new services and found new business opportunities in offshore Construction & Maintenance while developing and maintaining relationships with clients, increasing market awareness of the company's capabilities. 

I have ensured compliance with legal, regulatory, and other standards in Construction projects/operations while reviewing contract/tendering documentation and communicating contractual requirements to ensure that documentation is in line with specifications and requirements. I have coordinated procurement and operational project activities and monitored field work for compliance with standards, procedures, specifications, and codes. 

I have ensured adherence to HSE standards, quality requirements, and financial accountability while liaising with vessels and clients for day-to-day operations. I have participated in Operational management review and ensured employee health and safety, environmental protection, and performed other job-related duties as assigned.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Lead all aspects of numerous projects with diverse complexities in different stages to achieve desired outcomes while leveraging creative solutions. Administer active tender management process with executive leadership from tenders analysis, quantity take-offs, and risk factors evaluation to bid decision making, tender package finalisation, value engineering analysis, and pre/post tender meetings participation if needed. Issue RFIs, compare tender drawings with IFC drawings, and create claiming variations documents to assess and implement project plans, validate design IFC drawings, and rectify design discrepancies with clients. Lead the production of shop drawings for Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning systems, Fire Protection systems, plumbing systems, and Drainage systems in line with the given Issued for Construction (IFC) drawings, Coordination drawings and As-Built drawings with a team of AutoCAD draftsmen. preparation. Preserve integrity of projects by ascertaining adherence to local and international codes of standards in accordance with requirements of each project. Maintain constant communication with client representatives, sub-contractors, consultants, suppliers, and other agencies while reporting directly to Corporate Projects Director and GM regarding project progress, procurement, and billing.  combine both the descriptions and make it in one paragraph

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
As a Construction Manager, I have extensive experience leading numerous projects with diverse complexities in different stages, leveraging creative solutions to achieve desired outcomes. I have administered active tender management processes with executive leadership, from tenders analysis through to bid decision making, and participated in pre/post tender meetings, if needed. I have issued RFIs, compared tender drawings with IFC drawings, and created claiming variations documents to assess and implement project plans, validate IFC drawings, and rectify design discrepancies with clients. 

In addition, I have led the production of shop drawings for various systems, such as Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning, Fire Protection, plumbing, and Drainage, ensuring alignment with Issued for Construction (IFC), Coordination and As-Built drawings with a team of AutoCAD draftsmen. I have maintained the integrity of projects, ascertaining adherence to local and international codes of standards for each project. 

I have maintained constant communication with client representatives, sub-contractors, consultants, suppliers, and other agencies, reporting directly to the Corporate Projects Director and GM regarding project progress, procurement, and billing. Overall, my experience has equipped me with the necessary skills to lead and manage construction projects while delivering high-quality work.
